repo_notes.content: Module tags are the lowercased Task enum variant in src/registry/list.rs. `!yum` and `!dnf` are two tags for the same YumDnfTask implementation. These pages are regenerated by `jetpack gen-reference` — edit this file, not the pages under docs/content/docs/reference/.
repo_notes.author: jetpack

file.description: Manage the state of a file, directory entry, or symlink on the target. Set attributes (mode, owner, group) or remove the path.

parameters.name: remove
parameters.description: If true, delete the path. Templated as a boolean at evaluate time.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: File attributes: mode, owner, group, etc.

command.description: Run a command on the target directly, without a shell. Safer than `!shell` (no shell injection) but no pipes, redirection, or builtins. See [shell vs command](../../../usage/shell-vs-command/).
notes: Forbidden characters: ; < > & * ? { } [ ] $ ` — and no pipes or shell builtins.

shell.description: Run a command through a real shell (default `/bin/bash`). Use when you need pipes, redirection, or shell builtins.

apt.description: Manage packages with apt on Debian/Ubuntu.

yum.description: Manage packages with yum/dnf on RHEL-family hosts. `!yum` and `!dnf` are the same module (YumDnfTask).

dnf.description: Manage packages with yum/dnf on RHEL-family hosts. `!yum` and `!dnf` are the same module (YumDnfTask).

facts.description: Gather system facts (OS, architecture, distribution) about the target and expose them as `jet_*` variables for subsequent tasks. Must run before any `jet_*` variable is used.

echo.description: Print a message. Useful for debugging playbooks; the message is templated.

assert.description: Assert that an expression is true; fail the run otherwise.

check-local.description: Show configuration differences on the local machine (no changes).

ssh.description: Manage multiple remote hosts over SSH.

check-ssh.description: Show configuration differences over SSH (no changes).

pull.description: Pull and apply configuration locally, with optional inventory for variables.

show-inventory.description: Display resolved inventory hosts and groups.

inventory-check.description: Validate an inventory tree (groups, group_vars, host_vars).

full-check.description: Run syntax-check and inventory-check in one pass.

docs.description: Build and serve this documentation site locally.

-p.description: Playbook path(s); the automation content to run.

--playbook.description: Playbook path(s); the automation content to run.

-i.description: Inventory path; may be given multiple times (later paths overlay earlier ones).

--inventory.description: Inventory path; may be given multiple times (later paths overlay earlier ones).

--limit-hosts.description: Restrict the run to these hosts.

--limit-groups.description: Restrict the run to these groups.

--port.description: SSH port (ssh modes) or HTTP port (docs mode).

--sudo.description: Sudo to this user for all tasks by default.

--tags.description: Only run tasks/roles with one of these tags.

-e.description: Inject extra variables from a YAML file or quoted JSON.

--extra-vars.description: Inject extra variables from a YAML file or quoted JSON.

--no-browser.description: (docs mode) Print the local docs URL instead of opening a browser.

--forward-agent.description: Enable SSH agent forwarding for specific tasks (e.g. git).
